title: aclisia thomsonii
intro: Aclisia thomsonii, also known as the Himalayan cherry, is a species of flowering plant in the family Apocynaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Aclisia thomsonii include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support digestive health. In traditional herbal preparations, Aclisia thomsonii is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is also used in Ayurvedic and Unani medicine to treat various ailments.
